meta.title: iSkitch — Capture, annotate & share for macOS
meta.description: iSkitch is a modern, native macOS take on the classic Skitch — capture any region, window or full screen, annotate it instantly, and share with one click.

hero.badge: Now on the Mac App Store
hero.lead: iSkitch is a modern, native macOS take on the classic Skitch. Lives in your menu bar, ready for ⌥⌘4 at any moment — and shares through the macOS share sheet.

features.title: Built for the macOS you use today
features.lead: Native SwiftUI + AppKit. Lives in the menu bar. Designed to get out of your way until you press ⌥⌘4.

items.title: Capture anything
items.desc: Region (⌥⌘4), window or full screen. Opens straight in the editor.

items.title: 14 annotation tools
items.desc: Tapered arrows, text with system fonts, shapes, highlighter, pen, stamps and more.

items.title: Hide sensitive info
items.desc: Pixelate, blur, solid block or stripes — reliably unreadable.

items.title: Native sharing
items.desc: macOS share sheet, drag-out to any app, copy or save as PNG/JPG/PDF.

items.title: Spotlight & crop
items.desc: Focus attention on what matters. Crop with aspect ratio presets.

items.title: Privacy first
items.desc: No accounts. No tracking. No data leaves your Mac.

tools.title: All the marking tools you need

cta.title: Ready to ditch boring screenshots?
cta.lead: Free on the Mac App Store. No accounts. Just open it, press ⌥⌘4 and you're done.
